wordplay_note: One of the anti-psi team who experiences half-life deterioration
card_description: Don Denny is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Member of Runciter Associates caught between life and half-life. Name note: One of the anti-psi team who experiences half-life deterioration. Experiences the entropy and regression that defines the half-life world. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Member of Runciter Associates caught between life and half-life
reference.significance: Experiences the entropy and regression that defines the half-life world
